Appearances:
Plaintiff, Lynne Frank is present. Represented by Daniel Mulready.
Attorney, Brenda Cruz-Keith, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Imelda Cruz and Catarina Villareal, is present.
Attorney, Cheryl Kwok , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
This case did NOT settle.
The trial date of SEP-13-2010 remains on calendar.
